result.stdout:
tricep.cli v1.0.0

USAGE
  dotnet tricep.cli.dll [options]
  dotnet tricep.cli.dll [command] [...]

OPTIONS
  -h|--help         Shows help text. 
  --version         Shows version information. 

COMMANDS
  init              
  new live          
  new module        
  new template      
  ref               

You can run `dotnet tricep.cli.dll [command] --help` to show help on a specific command.

result.stdout:
tricep.cli v1.0.0

USAGE
  dotnet tricep.cli.dll new live --domain <value> --filename <value> [options]

OPTIONS
* -d|--domain       the file domain 
* -f|--filename     the name of the file 
  --skip-template   skip creation of template Default: "False".
  -h|--help         Shows help text.

result.stdout:
tricep.cli v1.0.0

USAGE
  dotnet tricep.cli.dll ref --file <values...> [options]

OPTIONS
* -f|--file         List of files to check references of. Full name with extension is supported 
  --create-deployment-data  
  -e|--environments  list of environments that you want configured 
  -h|--help         Shows help text.

commands.payload:
tricep.cli v1.0.0

USAGE
  dotnet tricep.cli.dll ref --file <values...> [options]

OPTIONS
* -f|--file         List of files to check references of. Full name with extension is supported 
  --create-deployment-data  
  -e|--environments  list of environments that you want configured 
  -h|--help         Shows help text.
